{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320153927E0DC324E26A3B62EA0D9"}"},"total":2469},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6996485181385425667","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书没有儿女情长，刻画了一名优秀特种兵为军区争光，为国建设一支超强特种部队。这本书也写出了战友之间的信任，友谊，这本书阳光，开朗，很适合我们阅读","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":17,"text":"特种兵","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773992367B62EA0D9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226996485181385425667%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226978790635255893000%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628996151,"group_id":"6978790635255893000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1i/Hn27CWS3UwnzjsK65C4NQigYrXLn6y1OWjMd3XIo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2f21785a6b784cec88d6bf9fa148f50a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530084&x-signature=fap6aPPyg%2BtsU%2Bh7UxzI5JgVaK8%3D","user_id":"2963898435386622","user_name":"炸天帮人事部大长老"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2963898435386622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6978790635255893000","book_info":{"abstract":"秦凡穿越到平行世界蓝星，成了一名退役特种兵。
在秦凡即将离开之时，再次被召回，任命他为代号“龙牙”特种部队选拔总教官！
秦凡觉醒“最强教官系统”，创建了一支又一支令世界各国闻风丧胆的特种部队！
你说我不懂练兵？
秦凡：绝望地狱周、 死亡之海、 极北雪山、无垠沙漠……我有无数种折磨人的方法！
你说我不懂特种战术？
秦凡：我这里有几十种领先世界二十年的战术！
